description:
You are a developer working on the TailwindTraders project. Address the feedback on Pull Request #2 ('Update Contact Page Styles') in the Azure DevOps web portal. Update the 'feature/contact-page' branch by changing the background color in 'style.css' to '#f5f5f5' and removing the 'console.log' debug statement in 'contact.js'. Reply to the general refactoring comment with 'Added to technical debt backlog' and mark all three comment threads as resolved.

Login Credentials:
- URL: http://localhost/DefaultCollection
- User: Docker
- Password: GymAnything123!
